title: Procurement Agent Use Case Canvas
summary: Defines scope, users, non-goals, human approvals, and expected business outcomes for the procurement assistant.

title: Procurement Data Inventory
summary: Lists policy documents, invoice templates, vendor master fields, retention constraints, and access limitations.

title: Procurement Pilot Evaluation Report
summary: Baseline evaluation for answer quality, citation grounding, extraction correctness, and human escalation behavior.

title: HR Policy Assistant Risk Assessment
summary: Identifies sensitive employee-impact topics and requires escalation for ambiguous eligibility questions.

title: Documentation Intelligence Evaluation Report
summary: Evaluates citation quality, document freshness warnings, summarization precision, and gap detection usefulness.

title: Documentation Monitoring Plan
summary: Defines citation drift checks, stale source alerts, answer quality sampling, and incident escalation.

title: Documentation Agent Production Runbook
summary: Operational runbook for user support, incident triage, source refresh, rollback, and approval contacts.
